description: Overall we have had an excellent experience with MT. We are very happy with the product and the service.
author: Christian N.
pros: The system is well thought out. The Payments, Ledgers, and Reconciliation products work very well together and we get a lot of value from them. The MT team is very responsive and provides excellent support. They are also responsive to feedback.
cons: We have encountered a few bugs which have had a negative impact on us. However, occasional bugs are to be expected with any software, and the MT team has generally resolved the issues in a timely manner.

description: Overall, I enjoyed working with the API and by extension the team. I found our account manager (Kristopher) to be extremely helpful and felt like he really championed our needs internally.
author: Paul M.
pros: I thought the API and uptime, for the most part, was well designed. It abstracted away implementation details, for the most part, which made things fairly easy to navigate.
cons: I often think of Modern Treasury as an API company but not a UI company. The APIs were quite good, however the user interface had numerous bugs or design flaws (in my opinion). One recent example: reversing a large ledger transaction displays various UI errors however clicking create still works!

review_title: Solid platform that is perfect for new company
description: This is a very capable platform to manage the basics.
author: Roderick A.
pros: Includes the basics needed to manage Treasury.
cons: Does not integrate with all banks and charges to execute direct file transmission can get costly.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Amazing, easy to understand and reconciliation is easy to do.
author: Nikki I.
pros: I love the feature of being able to see incoming payments and returns even when they are in the pending status. Love how all the reports are so clear and easy to understand.
cons: There’s nothing that I don’t like about MT. It’s been an amazing experience so far.

author: Jarred B.
pros: Generally solid support, responsive and takes care of a lot of trouble for us.
cons: Flat fee -- for a small volume compay like us, we don't hit the minimum fee with our volume.

review_title: MT is the next gen money command center
author: John Q.
pros: MT has robust and well documented APIs and a product team that is hungry to understand the needs and problems of their customers. MT has always been incredibly collaborative with us as we have built our payments, reconciliation and ledgers infrastructure to ensure we're doing so in a scalable way that best leverages the capability of the MT platform.
cons: N/A although I do wish there was a way to link accounts you don't want payments and reporting for via plaid so you can truly have all your accounts in one place, even if just to know balance.

review_title: Modern Treasury's ledgering and customer service is fantastic
description: I've always felt that the customer support and customer success teams were very helpful and responsive. We've been able to serve our end customers quickly in large part to MT always being quick to respond and provide solutions
author: Jesse W.
pros: It helps me have a extremely accurate ledger
cons: The reliance on our bank partner's docs to help Modern Treasury make the appropriate changes to their processes can be frustrating, as its out of our hands.

review_title: Best Treasury Management on the Market!
author: John K.
pros: The UI is fantastic. Also it makes money movement very simple and it displays all of the necessary information without overcomplicating things.
cons: Does not integrate with ERP systems and can get expensive quickly.

description: Overall we have had a good experience with Modern Treasury and they offer a great service making it simple to interact with ACH and Wire transfers into our bank.
author: Casey S.
pros: They are very responsive when there is an issue and we are able to quickly resolve them. The team is great to work with.
cons: we are using them in a different than most of their customers so some of the flows do not work the way we need them to making us create a unique integration.

description: All the humans that work at MT are fabulous, responsive and great to work with.
author: Caroline H.
pros: Makes banking simple by creating a simple interface.
cons: There have been recent changes to the setup pages that create more steps in my payment work flows.

review_title: Modern Treasury is a game changer
description: Overall, the experience with Modern Treasury has been great - the software is always improving for the better and making the job easier with each improvement.
author: Ryan B.
pros: The software's user-friendly interface makes managing payments and reconciling accounts a breeze. Its automation features have saved us many hours, significantly reducing manual errors and improving our overall efficiency. Customer service is also top notch.
cons: Reconciling checks to EPs can be difficult. Unable to un-reconcile a check and inability to reconcile multiple EPs to one check, or one EP to multiple checks.

author: Paulo D.
pros: Modern Treasury's team is supportive and responsive. They take a lot of interest in their customer's success which ensures smooth implementation and prompt support.
cons: I did not find anything to dislike. If there was ever anything that Modern Treasury could not do for us, it was because our request was out of their scope and roadmap.
